subcodes.title: Words spoken at 309 W 78th St in New York, 1912-07-17
subcodes.first_line: Calamities are of two kinds. One kind results from bad morals and misconduct such as falsehood, dishonesty
subcodes.first_line_orig: دو قسم آفاتست یکی را سبب اعمال و اخلاق غیر ممدوحه است مانند کذب و نفاق و خیانت و ظلم وامثال اینها
subcodes.subjects: @theodicy; the mystery of evil; of suffering, @law of transformation and change, @recompense; reward for belief; right action
